description: Browser with multiple tabs including Weixin, Feishu, GitHub, Slack, and Claude.ai, showing a Weixin MP captcha verification URL with blank page content.
Feishu chat conversation about GitHub token configuration, with user asking about .env file location and bot GSD replying about missing GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.
Discord conversation between MiaoDX and oc-demo bot discussing delayed messages and creating a daily 10am scheduled task to summarize system prompt changes.
Telegram chat with OpenClaw bot showing access not configured error, user ID, pairing code PCS9RASF, and instructions for bot owner approval.
JSON code editor showing validation error for 'scopes' field with list of valid permission values including aily:file:read, im:message, docs:document:read.
Chromium browser showing error page 'Can't open this page' for chatgpt.com with error code 5 and troubleshooting suggestions.
Feishu conversation where MiaoDX asks GSD and WLB to test chatting with Claude, both AI agents respond with welcome messages to #copycat channel.
Event poster for OpenClaw Meetup on March 14 exploring Agent civilization possibilities, featuring guest speakers, schedule, and NeonClaw Game sandbox activity.
Browser with multiple tabs including Weixin, Feishu, GitHub, Slack, and Claude.ai, showing a Weixin MP captcha verification URL with blank page content.
Error message from WLB bot showing failed edit operation on memory file due to text not matching exactly, requiring precise whitespace and newline matching.
